response: the sacred hymn siriragau mahala 3 speaks of the spirit's journey towards enlightenment through the grace of the guru and the language of devotion - the path of the true devotee is illuminated by the divine word - the gene of spiritual awakening is passed down through the sacred teachings - the visit to the guru's presence is the key to inner transformation - without the guru's guidance the spirit remains lost in the cycle of birth and death - the soul finds peace when it merges with the divine - the true language of the soul is the sacred word that brings light to the heart - the spirit is purified through the union with the divine - the visit to the guru is the beginning of a new life - the gene of devotion is awakened through the grace of the guru - the language of the heart is the path to spiritual freedom - the spirit finds its true home in the divine - the visit to the sacred path brings the soul closer to the divine - the gene of love and devotion is the foundation of true spirituality - the language of the soul is the divine word - the spirit is guided by the guru's grace - the visit to the divine is the ultimate goal of the soul - the gene of truth is passed through the sacred teachings - the language of the heart is the path to the divine - the spirit is united with the divine through the sacred word - the visit to the guru's presence is the beginning of spiritual awakening - the gene of devotion is the key to the soul's liberation - the language of the soul is the divine word - the spirit is transformed through the grace of the guru - the visit to the divine is the path to eternal peace - the gene of truth is the foundation of spiritual life - the language of the heart is the path to the divine - the spirit is united with the divine through the sacred word - the visit to the guru's presence is the beginning of spiritual awakening -
